Sunderfury  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 36
DMG: 25 Dmg Bonus: 132
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Haste: +36%
WT: 7.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Post Comment
A hideous Rat
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2005 at 6:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770645819
49 posts
Droped of a hideous rate, Mob not listed in tier one

Lvl 55 Warrior nothing special about it's damage,
▲ Page top
Haste Stack
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 11:43 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591782682456
48 posts
Does the haste on this stack with SCHW?

Best Regards,

Krushu Atrociter
▲ Page top
RE: Haste Stack
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2002 at 7:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758371020
Scholar
17 posts
Sadly, no. Permanent haste items do not stack with others..ie, If you have Silver Chitin Handwraps (22% Haste) and a Flowing Black Silk Sash (21% Haste), your haste will be 22%, not 43%. The highest haste item will always be used.

On the other hand, an item with permanent haste will stack with a haste effect song or spell, so if you have a permanent haste item like Silver Chitin Handwraps and an item with a triggered effect of haste..in this example an EyePatch of Plunder (20%Haste), it will stack to give you a total of 42% Haste.

In short
- 2 Permanent haste items will not stack
- 1 Permanent haste item and and 1 haste effect spell/song will stack
- 2 Haste effect spells/songs will not stack together*

*There is an exception of 2 High-en Bard Songs that will stack with other haste effects

--Hope that helps!--
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 04 2003 at 6:07 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) weapon with haste + armor with haste + haste spell cast on you, will stack.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 06 2003 at 10:34 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No they won't. Otherwise you'd see epic rogues running around with CoFs and 76% permanent haste (epic + CoF). I wish it did, but two items that give haste do NOT stack. 1 item + 1 buff + battlecry of the vah shir and one other Bard song will stack.
RE: Haste Stack
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2004 at 12:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798802592
5 posts
actually your wrong fluxus its 1 item + 1 spell or bardsong + battle cry of the valshir
▲ Page top

QuoteReply

Sunderfury
QuoteReply
# May 16 2002 at 3:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756561036
Scholar
26 posts
Got one of these tonight. Seems pretty damned fast, just too bad it won't stack with my sash... Anyway, you can't even compare it to a wurmslayer - 2 totally different weapons. If I had to compare it I'd use the Mithral 2hander as an example - only this weapon is much much better. People keep mentioning taunting, etc, but really unless you are the Main Assist it really doesn't matter & maybe one of these days now I'll max out my 2hs =)
▲ Page top
2hs?
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2002 at 9:48 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758953742
6 posts
Someone compaired this to a Wurmy. A Wurmy is a 1hs. This is a 2hs. Now how many Warriors would really use a 2hs? 36% Haste is great but the CoF and CoCW has 36% Haste, as well and you can use two weapons with those.

IMO this is a bad choice for God Loot for Warriors.
▲ Page top
RE: 2hs?
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2002 at 9:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765004652
74 posts
What warrior would be using a Wurmslayer by the time they got to PoH anyway? Oh right, none, or idiots.
▲ Page top
RE: 2hs?
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2002 at 7:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253491587
5 posts
Compare the weight of the two, and the delay, then factor in the haste. This is a VERY good weapon fo a drop in a plane such as Hate. Add in a good haste from a chanter, (lets say SoS from their epic), and this quickly turns into an aggro machine. Also the new delay would become sub-20 and the damage ratio would increase to close to 40 or so. Next time you speak, think before you open your mouth please.
▲ Page top
RE: 2hs?
QuoteReply
# May 05 2002 at 10:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757831952
View User Forum
157 posts
true but for agro you really have to have dual. Some 20 dly weapon with proc (can't recall name) will give alot more taunt. Though this may work as well...
▲ Page top
RE: 2hs?
QuoteReply
# May 23 2002 at 2:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780131429
464 posts
Since they added the damage bonuses, I've been able to hold taunt better with 2Hers than with DWing. Using Lammy in my Primary and the Guard Captains Mallet in my Secondary with Anyas Quickening on me (and the Ranger), I cannot pull aggro off a level 60 Ranger (With the same weapons).

With a Sarnak Battlehammer (30/40) in the exact same situations, I can hold aggro all day against her. Not sure why, but it seems to have gone from hitting more causes better aggro to hitting FOR more causes more aggro. I have no problems holding aggro with the 1Handers in a normal XP group, but if I'm the MA on a raid, the 2 Hander works better.
▲ Page top
RE: 2hs?
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 9:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779947950
198 posts
to be honest lammys kind of suck. Thre very fas and all but compared to other weapnos. Lammys are good 35-55 until u can afford the Frosty/Velium combo...mad haste with frostys proc is very nice..or buy a bloodfire it is a 504dmg DoT proc on it. So all u warriors out there increase that dam DEX and get rdy to proc =P

Grandmaster t'al
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2001 at 3:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250076841
3 posts
This baby dropped off of the Grandmaster tonight, he dropped a indo legs and the Sunderfury, This weapon is ungodly, at first i thought it was a proc haste but it isn't..it's permanent. This baby tends to hit harder than a wurmslayer although damage is the same but you swing it like a frikkin windmill...thx Dominion for letting Azure come along and holy god jesus..Scailes if you ever need a kidney or something, I probably owe ya one :P Mercurinor Desmodus 49th Lvl Warrior Xev server
